title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・お前は、

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet acquits herself admirably in the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next race will be the medium-distance senior
G1 Osaka Hai, where she confidently states that
she'll shine the brightest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, who was watching the race, quietly
acknowledges her rival's impressive performance.
